mapper.sql: id, biz_type, biz_id, biz_name, module_key, position, session_id, request_id, retry_count, user_message, history_messages, output_result, trace_snapshot, total_duration_ms, tokens_prompt, tokens_completion, tokens_total, model_name, status, is_deleted, error_message, created_by, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_execution_session WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM ai_execution_session WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_execution_session (biz_type, biz_id, biz_name, module_key, position, session_id, request_id, retry_count, user_message, history_messages, output_result, trace_snapshot, total_duration_ms, tokens_prompt, tokens_completion, tokens_total, model_name, status, is_deleted, error_message, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{bizName}, #{moduleKey}, #{position}, #{sessionId}, #{requestId}, #{retryCount}, #{userMessage}, #{historyMessages}, #{outputResult}, #{traceSnapshot}, #{totalDurationMs}, #{tokensPrompt}, #{tokensCompletion}, #{tokensTotal}, #{modelName}, #{status}, 0, #{errorMessage}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_execution_session SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE ai_execution_session SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
